paper_focus.title: Effect of temperature on the oxidation of Fe-7.5Al-0.65C alloy
paper_focus.research_objective: To understand the oxidation behavior of Fe-7.5Al-0.65C alloy and the role of temperature in controlling oxidation kinetics, internal oxidation, and nodule formation.
material_systems: Fe-7.5Al-0.65C alloy (nominal composition, actual Fe-7.54Al-0.65C with minor Mn, Si, P, S)
main_process_variables: atmosphere: dry air, flow rate 100 ml/min
prior processing: hot forged at 1200 °C, homogenized at 1100 °C for 4 h
sample preparation: mechanical polishing up to 1200 grit, ultrasonic cleaning in acetone
expected_information_axis: oxidation kinetics (weight gain curves, parabolic rate constants)
oxide scale morphology (optical microscopy, nodule formation)
elemental distribution (EPMA line scans, quantitative analysis)
mechanism of nodule growth and healing layer formation
